content:
🔥 ai-subtitles | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automatically generating and styling subtitles for video content.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered subtitle generation • Supports video uploads and direct media links • Uses Together AI's Whisper Large v3 for transcription • Real-time subtitle preview and styling with 6 preset styles • Export subtitles in .srt, .vtt, or burned-in .mp4 formats
📖 Summary: SubStudio is a web application built with Next.js that generates subtitles for videos using AI. It leverages Together AI's Whisper model for accurate transcription and allows users to edit, style, and export subtitles in various formats.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
